forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely late this afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Damaging winds possible about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h decreasing to 30 to 40 km/h during the morning then turning westerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely later tonight. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the early morning then turning northwesterly in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the coast. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Damaging winds possible near the coast. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely this afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then turning northwesterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the afternoon. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers near the eastern border early this morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon, possibly severe with destructive winds and large hail near the eastern border. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming west to southwesterly and light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Medium chance of showers near the eastern border, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon, possibly severe with damaging winds near the eastern border in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending west to northwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely later tonight. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning, possibly severe with damaging winds in the east in the late morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning, possibly severe with damaging winds. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog east of Ceduna. Very high chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning then becoming northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the day then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely at night. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning south to southwesterly and becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 22.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Very high chance of showers south of Woomera, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Coober Pedy in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending north to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 23.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, high chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Thunderstorms possibly severe with destructive winds and large hail in the southeast during the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
